name: Su Casa De Cambio
description_short: MoneyGram agent location offering money transfers, cash services, and international remittance processing at a currency exchange storefront in East Los Angeles.
description_long:
Su Casa De Cambio is a currency exchange and financial services storefront located in East Los Angeles that operates as an authorized MoneyGram agent location. The business serves as a neighborhood hub for cash-based financial transactions, particularly for customers needing international money transfer services and domestic cash handling. As a MoneyGram agent, the location provides access to MoneyGram's global money transfer network, allowing customers to send and receive funds domestically and internationally. The storefront is strategically positioned in a Latino neighborhood with high demand for remittance services and currency exchange.

The primary services offered at this location center on MoneyGram money transfers and cash-related financial services. Customers can send and receive money through MoneyGram's established network, which operates in over 200 countries and territories. The location accepts legal forms of identification for all transactions, following standard compliance requirements. Operating hours are extended and accessible, with weekday service until 7:30 PM and Friday hours extending to 8:00 PM, accommodating working customers. Weekend service is also available Saturday and Sunday.

As a MoneyGram agent rather than an independent operator, Su Casa De Cambio's distinction lies in its dual function as both a currency exchange business and authorized money transfer location. This combination allows customers to handle both international remittances and currency conversion in one location, serving immigrant communities sending money to family abroad. The location's branding as "Su Casa De Cambio" (Your Currency Exchange House) emphasizes cultural connection to the Latino community it serves. The extended hours and weekend availability differentiate it from traditional banking locations.

This is fundamentally a money transfer and check-cashing type operation, not a lending or credit service despite the emergency-cash miscategorization. Customers should understand that MoneyGram transfers involve fees and exchange rates that may not be competitive compared to digital-first remittance services. The requirement for legal ID is standard but may present barriers for undocumented individuals. No credit products, loans, or credit-building services are offered at this location.
address: 6571 E Olympic Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90022

company_info.headquarters: 6571 E Olympic Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90022

pros: Extended hours until 7:30 PM weekdays and 8 PM Friday, accommodating working customers
Weekend service available Saturday 8 AM-7 PM and Sunday 9 AM-5 PM
Established MoneyGram network enabling transfers to 200+ countries and territories
Dual currency exchange and money transfer services in single location
Accessible neighborhood location in East Los Angeles serving Latino community
Phone support available at (323) 980-9886 for transaction questions
Clear compliance with legal ID requirements protecting both business and customers
cons: MoneyGram transfers typically carry higher fees and less competitive exchange rates than digital remittance services like Wise or Remitly
No credit products, loans, or emergency lending despite emergency-cash categorization—purely cash transfer services
Legal ID requirement may exclude undocumented immigrants despite serving immigrant community
Requires in-person visits; no online money transfer capability mentioned despite MoneyGram's digital options
Limited service information on website—pricing, specific fees, and exchange rate details not disclosed
best_for: Immigrants sending remittances to family in Latin America who prefer in-person, cash-based transactions
Customers needing currency exchange services alongside international money transfers
Unbanked or underbanked individuals in East Los Angeles without digital payment access
People unfamiliar with online remittance platforms preferring trusted neighborhood financial locations
diagnosis: Su Casa De Cambio is best for Latino immigrants and underbanked customers in East Los Angeles needing in-person international money transfers and currency exchange services. The critical caveat is that this is a money transfer agent, not a lender or emergency loan provider—customers should not expect to borrow money, only to send or receive funds through MoneyGram's network at standard agent fees.
services: Money receiving services via MoneyGram network
Compliance-verified cash handling with legal ID verification
Neighborhood financial services for underbanked populations
